prompt: A refined anime-style illustration of a stylish Japanese office lady in her late 20s to early 30s trying on lipstick in front of a luxury cosmetics mirror inside an elegant department store beauty counter. Medium shot framed through the mirror, with her reflected figure centered and the back of her head and hand softly visible in the left foreground holding a lipstick tube. She has warm chestnut brown shoulder-length softly wavy hair with a side part, small gold earrings, and a delicate gold necklace. Her outfit is polished and feminine: a light beige tailored blazer with gold buttons, a white satin-like blouse, and a deep burgundy high-waisted skirt. She carries a small taupe handbag on one arm. In the reflection, she is applying lipstick to her lips with one hand while holding the lipstick case in the other, giving the impression of checking her makeup before or after work. The setting is upscale and softly lit, with a large ornate gold-framed mirror, blurred cosmetic displays in the background, and a glamorous premium beauty-counter atmosphere. At the bottom of the mirror is a black and gold display stand labeled LUXE BEAUTÉ. On the counter, show exactly 8 visible cosmetic items in a neat arrangement: 4 gold lipstick tubes standing on the left, 3 open lipsticks in shades of mauve, pink, and coral near the center-right, and 1 rectangular perfume or cosmetic bottle on the far right. Also include a glass vase with pale blush roses at the lower right. Use soft bokeh lighting, glossy luxury materials, delicate linework, smooth anime rendering, elegant mature OL fashion, warm neutral tones with burgundy accents, and a sophisticated feminine mood.
